The '''Aldereenians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]].<ref name="COPL" /> They were native to the [[Aldereen system/Legends|Aldereen system]],<ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|species=Aldereenian|system=[[Aldereen system/Legends|Aldereen system]]|legends=1}}</ref> located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories.<ref name="TEAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', which includes the existence of the [[Aldereenian Consulate]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], to [[8 ABY]].</ref> they maintained a [[Aldereenian Consulate|consulate]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The consulate was located almost 200 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] from the [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Cantham House/Legends|consulate]]. On the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] of the [[Wedding of Han Solo and Leia Organa/Legends|wedding]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] couple [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], their best man, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], was delivered to the Aldereenian consulate by an errant [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] driver.<ref name="COPL" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Aldereenians mentioned in the [[1994]] novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', written by [[Dave Wolverton]].<ref name="COPL" />
